content.query:
--create table using ctas/polybase

CREATE TABLE dedicated_sql_pool_ctas
WITH 
(
    DISTRIBUTION=ROUND_ROBIN
)
AS
SELECT * FROM dedicated_sql_pool_copy_into

SELECT * FROM dedicated_sql_pool_ctas



--create table using ctas/polybase using some external table


CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dedicated_sql_pool_ext_table_data2
(
    EmployeeID	INT,
    Name VARCHAR(100),
    Age	INT,
    Salary INT,
    Department	VARCHAR(100),
    HireDate VARCHAR(100),
    Skills VARCHAR(100)
)
WITH
(
    LOCATION='data2',
    DATA_SOURCE=dedicatedsqlpool_ext_data_source_,
    FILE_FORMAT=dedicatedsqlpool_ext_file_format_parquet
)
SELECT * FROM dedicated_sql_pool_ext_table_data2


CREATE TABLE dedicated_sql_pool_ctas_ext
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION=ROUND_ROBIN
)
AS
SELECT * FROM dedicated_sql_pool_ext_table_data2

SELECT * FROM dedicated_sql_pool_ctas_ext
